title: psacalium multilobum
intro: Psacalium multilobum, also known as Mexican plantain, is a perennial herb that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihistamine effects. The health benefits associated with Psacalium multilobum include relief from digestive issues, skin irritations, and allergies, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Psacalium multilobum typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and roots.
